signIn.title: Sign in to your account
signIn.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
signIn.googleNoAccount: No account found with email {{email}}. Please create an account first.
signIn.accountInactive: Your account is inactive. Contact the administrator.
signIn.accountPending: Your account has been created but is still pending administrator approval.
signIn.googleAuthFailed: Google authentication failed. Please try again.
signIn.registeredPending: Registration successful! Your account is pending approval by an administrator.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account exists with this email address, a reset link has been sent. The link is valid for 1 hour.
forgotPassword.checkSpam: Check your spam folder if you don't receive the email.
forgotPassword.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.passwordHint: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
resetPassword.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been changed successfully. You can now sign in.
resetPassword.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

errors.token_used: This link has already been used. Please request a new one.
errors.token_expired: This link has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.account_inactive: This account is disabled. Contact an administrator.

register.title: Create your account
register.googleRegistrationFailed: Google registration failed. Please try again.
